scripts.lock:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const root=path.resolve(__dirname,'../..');const forbidden=['yarn.lock','pnpm-lock.yaml','bun.lockb'];for(const f of forbidden){if(fs.existsSync(path.join(root,f))){console.error('门禁：发现不允许的锁文件',f);process.exit(1)}}const required=path.join(root,'package-lock.json');if(!fs.existsSync(required)){console.error('门禁：缺少 package-lock.json');process.exit(1)}"
scripts.secrets:check: node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const exts=new Set(['.ts','.tsx','.js','.jsx','.json']);const patterns=[/AKIA[0-9A-Z]{16}/,/-----BEGIN (RSA|EC|OPENSSH) PRIVATE KEY-----/,/(secret|token|password)\s*[:=]\s*['\"][^'\"]{8,}/i];const ignoreDirs=new Set(['node_modules','.git','dist','build','web-build','.expo','.tamagui']);function walk(dir){for(const ent of fs.readdirSync(dir,{withFileTypes:true})){if(ignoreDirs.has(ent.name)) continue;const p=path.join(dir,ent.name);if(ent.isDirectory()) walk(p);else if(exts.has(path.extname(ent.name))){const c=fs.readFileSync(p,'utf8');for(const r of patterns){if(r.test(c)){console.error('门禁：疑似敏感信息：',p);process.exit(1)}}}}}walk(path.resolve(__dirname,'src'));"
scripts.guard: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run arch:check && npm run feature:check && npm run lock:check && npm run secrets:check && npm run test
scripts.fix: npm run lint:fix && npm run format
